title: aspidium glabellum
intro: Aspidium glabellum, also known as the smooth spleenwort, is a type of fern found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Aspidium glabellum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
